description: Payload-binding arity mismatch (§51.0.B.1). Dragging(id: number) has ONE payload field, but <Dragging id extra rule=.Idle> declares TWO positional bindings. The binding count must match the variant's field count exactly, so E-ENGINE-PAYLOAD-ARITY-MISMATCH fires (the §34 error partition).
rationale: §51.0.B.1 payload-binding attribute counts in the bare-attribute/positional forms SHALL match the variant's payload field count exactly; too many bindings SHALL fire E-ENGINE-PAYLOAD-ARITY-MISMATCH.
